steps.title: Identify the rate
steps.content: In $d=7t+185$, the coefficient of $t$ is $7$. That means the rover's distance increases by $7$ feet each minute.

steps.title: Multiply by the time
steps.content:
Over $30$ minutes, the increase is:
$$7\cdot30=210$$
The rover's distance increases by $210$ feet. The answer is C.
